name: Butterscotch Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: 365 Great Chocolate Desserts - ISBN 0-06-016537-5
Preparation Time: 0:40
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and melted butterscotch chips; mix well.
3. Add eggs and vanilla and beat until well blended.
4. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt; mix well.
5. Stir in walnuts and chocolate chips.
6. Spread batter evenly in a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden and set. Let cool in pan.
8. Cut into 25 (1 1/2-inch) squares.
